failedAssertions.reason: Always allow did set runtime manual_override.respond.sign=allow, but Peer Policies view did not expose persistence metadata/removal control; removing override from Peer Policies and re-prompt verification could not be completed because that affordance is absent.

PolicyPromptModal was not observed during refresh_all_peers/pending-operation churn, but source inspection shows non-peer_denied proactive open paths via setActiveModal("policy-prompt") in Dashboard running/signing-blocked callbacks.
Modal open set body overflow to hidden, but wheel/PageDown still changed window.scrollY (0 -> 600), so background scroll lock was not effective.
Long content was not truncated/clamped in the CONTENT row; modal width expanded to content width causing horizontal overflow.

appliedUpdates.description: Added m2-approvals validator notes: use ~250-350ms post-enqueue wait for policy prompt queue sampling and seed dashboard via /demo before in-session navigation to avoid pre-hydration deep-link redirects.

frictions.description: Immediate post-dispatch reads can race React state propagation and under-report pending rows.
frictions.resolution: Used short post-dispatch waits (250-350ms) before collecting observability snapshots.

frictions.description: Periodic runtime refresh can settle pending ops quickly, making TTL sampling flaky.
frictions.resolution: Captured tighter timed snapshots and added a dedicated 2s TTL-decrement sample file for SIGN row evidence.

frictions.description: Immediate post-enqueue reads can report stale queue/dialog state before React commit; a short wait (~300ms) was needed before sampling observables.
frictions.resolution: Added deterministic wait steps before each modal-state capture.

frictions.description: Console contained one relay warning (`wss://relay.damus.io` WebSocket closed before established) while running locally with offline peers.
frictions.resolution: Continued with local synthetic denial-event validation; warning did not block modal/policy assertions.

frictions.description: Direct deep-link to /dashboard/demo-profile redirects to / before bridge-hydrated state is available during fresh navigations.
frictions.resolution: Seeded state via /demo dashboard route and used in-session navigation/test hooks for stable dashboard context.

frictions.description: agent-browser command chaining after heredoc eval failed with shell parsing when appending '&&'; I split eval and follow-up commands into separate calls.
frictions.resolution: Executed eval, wait, and screenshot as separate commands.

frictions.description: Dashboard showed multiple pre-existing 'Dismiss ping failure notice' controls during modal tests, adding noise to interactive snapshots.
frictions.resolution: Targeted modal controls by label and validated by queue/modal DOM state rather than relying on element index alone.
